blocked_reason: Casey.Brown lacks BICC privileges on the demo pod fa-etap-dev5-saasfademo1.ds-fa.oraclepdemos.com. /biacm/api/v[12]/* endpoints return 302 redirect to IDCS OAuth. To unblock: provide a different Fusion user with a BICC-admin role (e.g. BIA_ADMINISTRATOR_DUTY) + a configured AIDP `EXTERNAL STORAGE` profile pointing at the OCI Object Storage bucket BICC writes to.
cluster_format_check_notes: AIDP `aidataplatform` Spark format handler IS registered on the tpcds cluster — `com.oracle.dicom.connectivity.spark.builders.DataAssetBuilder.buildBicc` resolves the FUSION_BICC type. Probe with bogus options returned a connector-side validation error (DATA_ACCESS_LAYER_0029 on fusion.service.url), NOT a 'Failed to find data source' error. Cluster toolchain is verified ready; only user privileges + external-storage profile are missing.
official_sample_alignment: Skill rewritten to lead with `spark.read.format('aidataplatform').option('type', 'FUSION_BICC')` matching oracle-samples/oracle-aidp-samples → Read_Only_Ingestion_Connectors.ipynb. Custom REST trigger flow kept as Option B fallback.
next_step: Provide BICC-privileged Fusion user + register AIDP EXTERNAL STORAGE profile. Then re-run with FUSION_BICC_USER, FUSION_BICC_PASSWORD, FUSION_BICC_SCHEMA, FUSION_BICC_PVO, FUSION_BICC_EXTERNAL_STORAGE env vars set.
